info.title: Petstore API
info.description: A production-ready Petstore API built with FastAPI.

put.description:
Update an existing pet.

Args:
    pet: Updated pet data from request body.
    service: Injected PetService.

Returns:
    The updated pet.

post.description:
Add a new pet to the store.

Args:
    pet: Pet data from request body.
    service: Injected PetService.

Returns:
    The created pet.

get.description:
Find pets by status.

Args:
    status: Availability status to filter by.
    service: Injected PetService.

Returns:
    List of pets matching the given status.

schema.title: Response Find Pets By Status Api V1 Pet Findbystatus Get

get.description:
Find pets by tags.

Args:
    tags: Tag names to filter by.
    service: Injected PetService.

Returns:
    List of pets matching any of the given tags.

schema.title: Response Find Pets By Tags Api V1 Pet Findbytags Get

get.description:
Find pet by ID.

Args:
    pet_id: The pet's unique identifier.
    service: Injected PetService.

Returns:
    The pet with the given ID.

post.description:
Update a pet with form data.

Args:
    pet_id: The pet's unique identifier.
    service: Injected PetService.
    name: New name for the pet.
    status: New status for the pet.

Returns:
    The updated pet.

delete.description:
Delete a pet.

Args:
    pet_id: The pet's unique identifier.
    service: Injected PetService.

Returns:
    Confirmation message.

schema.title: Response Delete Pet Api V1 Pet  Pet Id  Delete

post.description:
Upload an image for a pet.

Args:
    pet_id: The pet's unique identifier.
    service: Injected PetService.
    file: The image file to upload.
    additional_metadata: Optional metadata string.

Returns:
    Confirmation message with file info.

schema.title: Response Upload File Api V1 Pet  Pet Id  Uploadfile Post

get.description:
Return pet inventories by status.

Args:
    service: Injected OrderService.

Returns:
    Dict mapping status to count of pets with that status.

schema.title: Response Get Inventory Api V1 Store Inventory Get

post.description:
Place an order for a pet.

Args:
    order: Order data from request body.
    service: Injected OrderService.

Returns:
    The placed order.

get.description:
Find purchase order by ID.

Args:
    order_id: The order's unique identifier (1–10).
    service: Injected OrderService.

Returns:
    The order with the given ID.

delete.description:
Delete purchase order by ID.

Args:
    order_id: The order's unique identifier.
    service: Injected OrderService.

Returns:
    Confirmation message.

schema.title: Response Delete Order Api V1 Store Order  Order Id  Delete

post.description:
Create a new user.

Args:
    user: User data from request body.
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    The created user.

Create users from a list.

Args:
    users: List of user data from request body.
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    List of created users.

schema.title: Response Create Users With List Api V1 User Createwithlist Post

get.description:
Log user into the system.

Args:
    username: The username to log in with.
    password: The password to log in with.
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    Dict containing the session token.

schema.title: Response Login User Api V1 User Login Get

get.description:
Log out current logged-in user session.

Args:
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    Confirmation message.

schema.title: Response Logout User Api V1 User Logout Get

get.description:
Get user by username.

Args:
    username: The user's username.
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    The user with the given username.

put.description:
Update user by username.

Args:
    username: The user's current username.
    user: Updated user data.
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    The updated user.

delete.description:
Delete user by username.

Args:
    username: The user's unique username.
    service: Injected UserService.

Returns:
    Confirmation message.

schema.title: Response Delete User Api V1 User  Username  Delete

get.description:
Return service health status.

Returns:
    JSON response with status and storage mode.

Category.title: Category
Category.description:
Pet category.

Attributes:
    id: Category identifier.
    name: Category name.

Order.title: Order
Order.description:
Full order schema including server-assigned fields.

Attributes:
    id: Order identifier.

OrderCreate.title: OrderCreate
OrderCreate.description: Schema for creating a new order.

Pet.title: Pet
Pet.description:
Full pet schema including server-assigned fields.

Attributes:
    id: Pet identifier.

PetCreate.title: PetCreate
PetCreate.description: Schema for creating a new pet.

PetUpdate.title: PetUpdate
PetUpdate.description:
Schema for updating an existing pet.

Attributes:
    id: Pet identifier (required for updates).

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description:
Pet tag.

Attributes:
    id: Tag identifier.
    name: Tag name.

User.title: User
User.description:
Full user schema including server-assigned fields.

Attributes:
    id: User identifier.

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description:
Schema for creating a new user.

Attributes:
    password: User's plain-text password (hashed before storage).

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description:
Schema for updating an existing user.

Attributes:
    password: New password (optional).

APIKeyHeader.description: API key required to access protected endpoints.
APIKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
